owner_boundary.displayed_by: Nguyen Duy Hieu - Frontend Demo Tool
owner_boundary.rule: Frontend only displays provided evaluation values. It does not calculate Recall, MRR, NDCG, latency, citation coverage or context quality.

data_provenance.source: Mock evaluation results for Sprint demo

golden_dataset_coverage.note: Only 5 query-level rows are included for frontend demo review. Full golden dataset output is expected from the API & Evaluation owner.

query_results.query: Tôi muốn resort yên tĩnh gần biển cho gia đình
query_results.notes: Top results include family-friendly beach resorts with citations and context chunks.

query_results.query: Khách sạn phù hợp cho chuyến công tác ở trung tâm
query_results.notes: Returned central hotels suitable for business travel. Ranking should be verified with real evaluator.

query_results.query: Địa điểm nghỉ dưỡng có tiện ích cho trẻ em
query_results.notes: Returned family-oriented properties with child-friendly amenities in mock data.

query_results.query: Khách sạn gần biển có spa và hồ bơi
query_results.notes: Relevant beach resort found. Full spa-specific validation requires richer backend metadata.

query_results.query: Khách sạn giá rẻ gần sân bay cho một đêm
query_results.notes: Mock result set does not include enough airport-budget coverage. This should be retested when real Search API is available.
